g.text: reconcile desired spec and live status
read CR status and finalizer state
get the current resource by known identifier
persist the resolved OCID in status
persist the created OCID in status
Confirm deletion with GetRedisCluster until the lifecycle is DELETED or the resource is not found.
Delete the owned Secret after OCI delete confirmation.
Always route resolved or bound resources through UpdateRedisCluster.
Move the Redis cluster compartment before mutable updates when compartment drift exists.
apply the supported in-place mutation path
upsert the owned Secret for the usable active resource
- A direct DeleteRedisCluster 404 currently short-circuits completion and
can skip Secret cleanup on that branch.
- Resolved-name and status-based binds both keep using the retained OCID
